content:
Groww — Weekly Review Pulse — 2026-W24 [anchor:groww-2026-W24]

Period: Last 10 weeks (Google Play) · Reviews analyzed: 32

Top themes
• 1. Theme cluster 0 — Users mention: The app freezes exactly when the market opens every single morning.
• 2. Theme cluster 2 — Users mention: Very easy to use interface for beginners starting their investment journey.
• 3. Theme cluster 1 — Users mention: Brokerage charges are too high compared to other discount brokers available.

Real user quotes
• "The app freezes exactly when the market opens every single morning."
• "Very easy to use interface for beginners starting their investment journey."
• "Brokerage charges are too high compared to other discount brokers available."

Action ideas
• Investigate reported issues and prioritize fixes.

Who this helps
This pulse helps product and support teams spot recurring Groww feedback themes including: Theme cluster 0, Theme cluster 2, Theme cluster 1.
